question: Chapters
feedback: The passage only enumerates the three parts of the introduction, not the main sections or chapters of the thesis itself. Therefore it does not list the thesis’s main sections.

question: Description
feedback: The text lists the titles of the introduction’s parts but does not provide a brief description of what each part contains. Hence it fails to meet the requirement of briefly describing the contents of each section.

question: Structure
feedback: From the passage it is clear that the introduction will have three parts, but there is no indication of the overall thesis structure (e.g., literature review, methodology, results, discussion). Thus the general structure of the thesis cannot be inferred.
